titleStmt.title: SII 16.207: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 207. (A.R. No. 379 of 1920.) ŌBUḶĀPURAM NEAR KHĀDARPĒṬA, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a rock in the water course.

This is dated Śaka 1478 (current), Rākshasa, Pushya ba. 30, ardhōdaya, Sunday when Śravaṇa-nakshatra commenced at °22 of the day fulfilling the conditions for ardhōdaya. The details correspond to 1556 A.D., January 12.

It records a gift of the vipravinōdi-varttana due from the agrahāra villages Dēvarapalle in Gutti-sīma and Jambuladinna in Pennakajerla by Cheṁnayya, son of Vipravinōdi Chernūri Kēśavaya to god Doḍa Avubhaḷadēva for the daśami festivals.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī vijayādyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbu
lu 1478 Agunēṭi rākṣasa saṁvatsara puṣya ba 30 A¨rdhōda
ya puṁṇyakālamaṁdu śrīvīrapratāpa sadāsivadēva mahārāyalu
vajrasiṁhāsanārūḍhulayi pṛthvisāṁbrājyaṁ sēyucuṁḍagānu vasiṣṭa
gōtra Āpastaṁbhasūtra yajuśākhādhyāyulayina vipravinō
di ce¨rnūri kēśavaya koḍuku ceṁnayagāru guttisīmaku celle dē
varapale peṁnakaje¨rllaku celle jaṁbuladiṁnne yī Agrahārā
laṁdu māku yiccē va¨rtanasū sakalamayinaṭuvaṁṭi vipravinō
dulakellānu puṁṇyaṁgānu doḍaAvubhaḷadēvara daśami mahōtsavānaku
dhārapōstimi gāna yī dha¨rmānaku yavaru tappinānu sunakamā
vasaṁ surāpānaṁ sēviṁcinavāḍu tama mānaṁ tama goḍugu
paṭevāniki yicinavāḍu Ani yicina dha¨rmaśāsanaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 16.207 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
